allies.rationale_text: Feedback-loops give iteration the signal path that makes each cycle produce learning rather than repetition for its own sake.
allies.source_quote: Iteration is the physical manifestation of a healthy feedback loop.

allies.rationale_text: Experimentation turns iteration into disciplined test-and-learn movement instead of undirected activity.
Systems-thinking keeps iteration connected to the wider machine so each loop updates the structure, not just a local artifact.
allies.source_quote: Iteration is essential for managing living systems, which are not amenable to simple linear beliefs.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias turns iteration into a ritual that protects the current direction instead of genuinely updating the hypothesis.
antagonists.source_quote: Confirmation bias ... works against the iterative process, where ideas must be constantly updated and changed as learning progresses.

antagonists.rationale_text: Status-quo-bias makes iteration ceremonial by preserving the current approach even after new loop evidence points elsewhere.
antagonists.source_quote: iteration conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when review loops become ceremonial and prevent substantive change.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Iteration conflicts with commitment-bias when teams resist pivoting after new cycle evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: iteration vs commitment-and-consistency-bias: iteration conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias (commitment and consistency bias) when teams resist pivoting after new cycle evidence.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Iteration conflicts with status-quo-bias when review loops become ceremonial and prevent substantive change.
structured_tensions.source_quote: iteration vs status-quo-bias: iteration conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when review loops become ceremonial and prevent substantive change.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Iteration conflicts with confirmation-bias when cycle reviews are used to confirm the current direction rather than genuinely test whether the initial hypothesis should be revised.
structured_tensions.source_quote: iteration vs confirmation-bias: iteration conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when cycle reviews are used to confirm the current direction rather than genuinely test whether the initial hypothesis should be revised.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strong on the feedback-loop alliance and on an explicit structured tension block around anti-update pressures, so the file preserves that compact surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor process relations beyond the strongest experimental, systems, and anti-stagnation links.
open_questions: Goal-setting is source-real in the broader process framing, but the retained set favors the strongest direct learning-loop neighbors in the current curated surface.
